title: setaria sphacelata
intro: Setaria sphacelata, also known as African bird's foot grass or buffalo grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Setaria sphacelata include treating skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or infused in oil to create a topical treatment for various health issues.
